description: Composition Grey brief with a contrast red branded waistband, made of 100% cotton, soft elasticated high leg with a comfortable front pouch, contrast panel stitch on the sides and a printed inner label for tag free comfort Procured from authorized channel partner of Sri SR Mill, Tanuku (AP) & ndash the India licensee for Playboy Men& rsquo s Underwear Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Non chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry low Medium heat iron Once you experience the superior comfort and cheeky style of playboy inner wear, there's no going back. Crafted from soft cotton with soft elastic, perfect for your comfort, Playboy has kept your convenience in mind while designing this pair of briefs.
